subject: Fw: FW: chopper
body:
----- Forwarded Message -----
From: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
To: Lesley Groff <lesley@nysgllc.com> 
Sent: Friday, May 18, 2007 4:37 PM
Subject: Re: FW: chopper
 

tell larry ok
--- Lesley Groff <lesley@nysgllc.com> wrote:

>

> Lesley Groff
> Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein

> From: Dowling, David [mailto:ddowling@islecap.com] 
> Sent: Friday, May 18, 2007 2:38 PM
> To: Lesley Groff
> Cc: Buckland, Teri
> Subject: chopper
> 
> 
> 
> Hey Lesley,
> 
> Andrew was hoping to be able to use Jeffery's
> chopper on Wednesday May
> 23rd. If this is possible, please let me know. 
> 
> Depart Puerto Rico at approx 4:30 and fly to STT. 
> 
> Thx, David
> 
> ________________________________
> 
>
